name: Ms Fields Pumpkin Spice Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. PREHEAT OVEN TO 300°F.
2. MIX FLOUR, SODA, SALT AND PUMPKIN PIE SPICE IN A MEDIUM BOWL AND SET ASIDE.
3. IN A LARGE BOWL, BLEND SUGARS WITH AN ELECTRIC MIXER SET ON LOW SPEED.
4. ADD THE BUTTER AND BEAT TO FORM A GRAINY PASTE.
5. SCRAPE SIDES OF THE BOWL, THEN ADD EGG, PUMPKIN AND VANILLA.
6. BEAT AT MEDIUM SPEED UNTIL LIGHT AND FLUFFY.
7. ADD THE FLOUR MIXTURE, RAISINS AND WALNUTS. BLEND AT LOW SPEED JUST UNTIL COMBINED.
8. DROP ROUND TABLESPOONS OF DOUGH ONTO UNGREASED COOKIE SHEETS, 1 1/2 INCHES APART.
9. BAKE 22-24 MINUTES UNTIL COOKIES ARE SLIGHTLY BROWN ALONG THE EDGES.
10. IMMEDIATELY TRANSFER TO A COOL SURFACE.
